name: douyin-1-100-focus-game
description: 抖音 1-100 专注力训练游戏

scripts.build:analyze: node build.js && node -e "console.log('Build analysis complete. Check dist/ folder.')"
scripts.size-check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const getSize=dir=>{let size=0; const files=fs.readdirSync(dir); files.forEach(file=>{const filePath=path.join(dir,file); const stats=fs.statSync(filePath); if(stats.isDirectory()){size+=getSize(filePath)}else{size+=stats.size}}); return size}; const distSize=fs.existsSync('dist')?getSize('dist'):0; console.log('Package size:', Math.round(distSize/1024/1024*100)/100, 'MB'); console.log('Within 4MB limit:', distSize < 4*1024*1024 ? 'YES' : 'NO');"
scripts.optimize: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run verify
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:integration
